meta.question: Where is the APS model located in the package hierarchy?
meta.finalAnswer: The APS (Alignment and Phasing System) model elements are distributed across several packages within the TMT project. Based on the search, elements such as 'Configure APS for SH Test' and 'Check/Set APS is ready' are located within the '_TMT_RecycleBin' package. Other related views and documents are found in various locations, including 'TMT-APS-SE' and 'APS Performance Requirements' packages. There is no single, unified 'APS model' package identified in the current hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial search identified several elements related to 'APS'. The most relevant structural location appears to be within the 'Alignment and Phasing System' package. I will now map the properties of this package to confirm its hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Alignment and Phasing System" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The previous query for 'Alignment and Phasing System' returned no results, likely due to exact name matching issues. I will search for the package using a partial name match to identify its correct URI and then explore its hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Alignment and Phasing System")))
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The search for 'Alignment and Phasing System' still returned no results. I will try searching for 'APS' again and look at the owner of one of the identified elements to trace the hierarchy upwards.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The exploration shows that elements related to 'APS' are located in various packages, including the '_TMT_RecycleBin'. Given the lack of a single, clear 'APS model' package, I will report the findings based on the identified elements.

request.answer: The APS (Alignment and Phasing System) model elements are distributed across several packages within the TMT project. Based on the search, elements such as 'Configure APS for SH Test' and 'Check/Set APS is ready' are located within the '_TMT_RecycleBin' package. Other related views and documents are found in various locations, including 'TMT-APS-SE' and 'APS Performance Requirements' packages. There is no single, unified 'APS model' package identified in the current hierarchy.
